snippet.title: Stronghold 4 - Announcement Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
Wishlist Stronghold 4 Now! - https://store.steampowered.com/app/2153760/

Wood needed! Return to the green roots of Stronghold in this narrative prequel to the original 'castle sim'. Immerse yourself in a cinematic campaign, hone your siegecraft with new mechanics in skirmish mode and customise your castles with a wide selection of castle pieces and cosmetics.
Stronghold 4 is the long-awaited next mainline entry in the Stronghold 'castle sim' series, bringing cinematic story and medieval immersion to the forefront of real-time strategy.

Follow the tale of Penryn of Wethel as his simple shepherd’s life is upended and he is forced through trial by fire to become the leader he sees within himself. 

Feel the impact of a living medieval world on your castle economy and siegecraft, as you battle against hostile outlaws, rival lords and the elements themselves, with the bloody sieges and grand warfare of Stronghold feeling more epic than ever before!

Stronghold 4’s demo arrives on June 23rd. Your Stronghold awaits!

Wishlist the game today! - https://store.steampowered.com/app/2153760/

Join the Discord - https://discord.com/invite/strongholdofficial

Subscribe for Emails - https://www.fireflyworlds.com/signup

snippet.title: DJ Chris Bernard - Come back and Stay | #dance #pop Producer HouseWorker
snippet.description:
Der erste Love Song für alle, die nie tanzen wollen. DIESER SONG DIESE NACHT UND NUR WIR - DU WEIẞT ICH MACH DAS NIE DOCH HEUT TANZ ICH MIT DIR!
"Come back and Stay" ist Nachfolger von "Die Engel singen" als englische Version. Lyrik & Melodie by DJ Chris Bernard. 


Have Fun

[Verse 1]
You left your coat by the door
Still smells like rain and smoke
I keep your mug in the sink
Like you might walk in and joke

The chair still faces the light
Your note is folded thin
I read it more than I should
And I let your name sink in

[Pre-Chorus]
Come back and stay
Don't let it fade
I kept the room the same
For better days

[Chorus]
Come back and stay
For good this time
Please stay
Don't leave me behind

Everything we had together
Still lives in the seams
Come back and stay
For good this time
Please stay with me

[Verse 2]
Your boots by the front step
Still dusty from that night
I hear your laugh in the hall
Then it's gone by morning light

I tried to let it go
I tried to look ahead
But every corner in this house
Still says the words you said

[Pre-Chorus]
Come back and stay
Don't make me wait
I kept the door unlocked
I kept the faith

[Chorus]
Come back and stay
For good this time
Please stay
Don't leave me behind

Everything we had together
Still lives in the seams
Come back and stay
For good this time
Please stay with me

[Bridge]
If you call, I will answer
If you knock, I will run
I don't need perfect
I just need us

One more chance
One more night
One more way to get it right

[Final Chorus]
Come back and stay
For good this time
Please stay
Don't leave me behind

Everything we had together
Still lives in the seams
Come back and stay
For good this time
Please stay with me

Come back and stay (stay)
For good this time (stay)
Please stay
Please stay with me

snippet.title: METRO 2039 | Gameplay Reveal - Hunter
snippet.description:
There's a liar in these tunnels... 

In the Xbox Games Showcase, we revealed our first full gameplay trailer for METRO 2039, featuring nearly three minutes of footage captured completely in-game. We’re also proud to let you know that the game will be in your hands in February 2027 where it will launch on Xbox Series S|X, PlayStation 5, Steam and Epic Games Store. 

Wishlist METRO 2039  
Xbox: https://www.microsoft.com/store/productid/9nt5pb1rz9ld
PlayStation: https://store.playstation.com/en-us/concept/10009337
Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2590240/METRO_2039/
Epic Games Store: https://store.epicgames.com/p/gozo-086260

read more about the trailer at www.METRO2039.com

We know the reveal left the community itching to see more gameplay and with lots of questions about the world, the Stranger, Hunter and more

We called this trailer HUNTER for one reason – it’s all about him. In April, we revealed that our antagonist was not just “Fuhrer”, but none other than the first Spartan himself, Hunter. Today, we get our first in-game look at him, adorned in decorated Novoreich uniform, a fascist perversion of the iconic Spartan armour. His image can be seen all over, his presence looming over the Metro in crumbling posters, flickering propaganda, and towering statues.

Gameplay was really what we wanted to show off here. Captured entirely in-game, we give glimpses into the diverse environments from the game, including many that directly inspired the nightmarish visions of our reveal trailer – from deadly wildlands to irradiated Moscow streets, struggling station communities, and the terrifying depths of the tunnels themselves.

Captured entirely in-game, with a blend of first-person shots and custom camera angles, fans can witness METRO 2039’s trademark mix of immersion, survival, stealth, violence, and horror. Everything that makes METRO, METRO, has returned, but there are some new features hinted at here too, from your first look at the Shatun weapon firing in anger, to new items, new mutant variants, and new ways to explore or take advantage of the environment. We can’t wait to show you more.

Twitter/X: https://x.com/metrovideogame 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/metrovideogame 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/MetroVideoGame/ 
Tik Tok: https://www.tiktok.com/@metrovideogame 

About METRO 2039:  

The year is 2039.   

For a quarter century, the last survivors of nuclear war have been locked in bitter conflict deep in the Metro tunnels beneath the poisoned city of Moscow. Now, finally, they have been united by a single leader, a fanatical Spartan known as Hunter. 

But this is no peace: Hunter’s Novoreich regime rules through propaganda and fear, subjugating the population in the name of a new war for the surface against a dark and terrifying enemy. 

In the wilderness beyond the city, the reclusive Stranger is haunted by violent waking nightmares. When the ghosts of his past force him out of exile, he must undertake a harrowing journey into the shattered ruins of Moscow, to the one place he swore he’d never go. 

The Metro. 

Experience the most shocking METRO adventure yet in a powerful single-player story that weaves exploration, survival, combat and stealth across a hauntingly beautiful but deadly world with unparalleled immersion. 

Inspired by the worldwide best-selling METRO book trilogy by Dmitry Glukhovsky 

Threads: https://www.threads.com/@metrovideogame 
Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/metrovideogame.bsky.social 
Discord: https://discord.com/invite/metrovideogame 

Music: "Ugly & Vengeful" by Anna Von Hausswolf
Published by Fairwood Music (UK) Ltd
Composed by Anna Von Hausswolff, Filip Leyman, and Karl Vento

snippet.description:
Spiele für Steam, Uplay und Co. jetzt digital bei Gamesplanet.com kaufen: http://bit.ly/2of1MR0 (WERBUNG*)

Genau 25 Jahre nach ihrem ersten Burgenbau-Epos haben die Firefly Studios jetzt Stronghold 4 angekündigt. Der klassische mittelalterliche Mix aus Aufbau- und Echtzeitstrategie soll noch 2026 in den Early Access marschieren. Der 1.0- Release ist dann für 2027 geplant. Aber schafft Stronghold 4 es endlich, nach mehreren miesen bis durchwachsenen Ablegern und dem völlig verbuggten Stronghold 3 von 2011 an die guten alten Zeiten anzuknüpfen?

Wir haben bereits eine Vorschau-Version von Stronghold 4 ausprobiert und zeigen Gameplay aus zwei Missionen im Video.

snippet.description:

Commercial landers are needed to bring astronauts to the lunar surface during future Artemis missions. 

Credit: NASA

يحرم على قلبي الندم

snippet.title: DOOM: The Dark Ages | Revelations - Official Trailer  (4K) | Available July 7
snippet.description:
HELL FREEZES OVER in DOOM: The Dark Ages | Revelations, an all-new campaign expansion that unleashes a brutal new chapter of the Slayer’s saga. 
 
Wounded and betrayed, the Slayer is thrust into a merciless purgatory only escapable by confronting haunting truths and forging new strength with the help of a mysterious ally. He must ascend from the prison of his mind and fight an abomination of the gods to set his followers on the path to freedom. 
 
Featuring new levels with deeper puzzles, new demons, and new mysteries, Revelations opens up a whole new dimension of combat. The all-new deadly Chain Spear offers returning slayers a uniquely satisfying combat system – one that rewards mastery with enhanced power and mobility. 
 
Also included is the highly anticipated Ripatorium 3.0, adding DLC content (3 new maps, new demons, and fully upgraded new weapons) plus deeper customization, improved pass code generation, and saving + loading personal presets. 

Available July 7, 2026*. https://t.co/DCP5jMAfk4 

For more information on all things DOOM: The Dark Ages and id Software, follow these channels and join the Slayers Club.   

Twitter: https://x.com/DOOM 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/doom 
Discord: https://discord.gg/DOOM 
Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/doom.com 
Threads: https://www.threads.net/@doom 
Facebook:  https://www.facebook.com/DOOM  
Website: https://doom.com
Slayers Club: https://slayersclub.bethesda.net

localized.description:
HELL FREEZES OVER in DOOM: The Dark Ages | Revelations, an all-new campaign expansion that unleashes a brutal new chapter of the Slayer’s saga. 
 
Wounded and betrayed, the Slayer is thrust into a merciless purgatory only escapable by confronting haunting truths and forging new strength with the help of a mysterious ally. He must ascend from the prison of his mind and fight an abomination of the gods to set his followers on the path to freedom. 
 
Featuring new levels with deeper puzzles, new demons, and new mysteries, Revelations opens up a whole new dimension of combat. The all-new deadly Chain Spear offers returning slayers a uniquely satisfying combat system – one that rewards mastery with enhanced power and mobility. 
 
Also included is the highly anticipated Ripatorium 3.0, adding DLC content (3 new maps, new demons, and fully upgraded new weapons) plus deeper customization, improved pass code generation, and saving + loading personal presets.
